scripts.setup: npm install --prefix server && npm install --prefix client
scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web -c blue,green "npm run dev --prefix server" "npm run dev --prefix client"
scripts.dev:py: concurrently -n api,web -c magenta,green "npm run api:py" "npm run dev --prefix client"
scripts.dev:php: concurrently -n api,web -c blue,green "npm run api:php" "npm run dev --prefix client"
